headline: Intel will see 'drastic dollar expansion': Earnings takeaways
summary: Intel (INTC) reported first quarter results on Thursday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $0.29 (compared to analyst estimates of $0.01), and revenue came in at $13.6 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $12.36 billion). Intel's second quarter revenue guidance also beat Wall Street's expectations. Creative Strategies CEO and principal analyst Ben Bajarin joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the results.

Intel's second quarter revenue guidance also beat Wall Street's expectations. Creative Strategies CEO and principal analyst Ben Bajarin joins Yahoo Finance to discuss the results.

headline: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) Delivers Strong Q1 Numbers, Stock Jumps 12.7%
summary: Computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $13.58 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($14.3 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 9.2% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.29 per share was significantly above analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) Delivers Strong Q1 Numbers, Stock Jumps 12.7%
raw.summary: Computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $13.58 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($14.3 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 9.2% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.29 per share was significantly above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Tesla Reframes Growth Around AI Robots And Robotaxis After Q1 Rebound
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) reported Q1 2026 results that included a rebound in profit and revenue. The company outlined a shift toward AI, robotics, and robotaxi growth, including preparations for an Optimus humanoid robot factory. Tesla announced new semiconductor manufacturing partnerships, including with Intel, tied to its custom AI chips. Robotaxi services are being expanded into additional U.S. cities as part of Tesla's autonomous mobility plans. Tesla shares trade at $387.51, with a 1 year...
